MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO CHRONICLE'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER THE CALIFORNIA PUBLIC RECORDS ACT.

APPEARANCES: Stephen H. Yuhan, Esq. of Hearst Corporation 212/649-2021 & Karl Olson, Esq. of Ram & Olson LLP 433-4949 for petitioner & moving party; Sherri Sokeland Kaiser, Deputy City Atty 554-4691 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: (Court made a personal disclosure. No objections were made.) Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: DENIED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS OF RULING. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
